/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc  -Wall   -O3 -funroll-loops -fomit-frame-pointer -mtune=native -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX12.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/Users/wangjiawei/Desktop/mktpfl-singlesv/mkTPFL/srcs-cpython/MKLHS-Python/MKLHS/relic/src/src/low/gmp/  CMakeFiles/bench_cp.dir/bench_cp.c.o -o ../bin/bench_cp  ../lib/librelic_s.a /usr/local/lib/libgmp.dylib
